items.title: Switzerland to vote on plan to cap population at 10 million
items.summary: The right-wing Swiss People's Party calls the plan a "sustainability initiative", but opponents say it is a recipe for chaos.

items.title: French Polynesia Protects Biodiverse Ocean Area Twice the Size of Arizona Teeming with Life
items.summary: The French Polynesian government recently announced it will fully protect 200,000 square miles of ocean, an area about twice as large as Arizona that’s teeming with ocean life. Located near the Austra…
